### ▍题型

通知、邀请；建议、推荐；感谢、投诉、道歉


建议、通知、回应说明

求职信；通知（科技、文化类活动），介绍邀请（传统节日习俗、职业规划论坛），道歉，建议（竞赛准备）

中国特色（非遗技艺、历史建筑、传统著作），社会发展（高铁，5G，垃圾分类，再新能源）

chinese delicacy 	Fly-Flower Game

![图片](data:image/png;base64,)

### 第一部分


#### ▍邮件称谓


给熟悉的人：朋友、笔友、同学、家人

-Dear 名字 // 删除姓氏，若题目中无名字，需要编撰姓名；

-Dear 家庭称谓：Dad, Mom, Brother, Sister


给不熟悉的人：老师、教授、专家

-Dear Mr./Ms./Prof./Dr. 姓氏

-Dear 社会称谓：Teacher, Professor, Expert


给组织机构：图书馆、校医院、学生会、报社、招生办、公司、社区

-Dear 职位：Curator（馆长）, Doctor, President, Editor, Admissions Office, Hiring Manager

-Dear Sir or Madam, To whom it may concern // 过于正式且过时的表达，尽量避免


![图片](data:image/png;base64,)

#### ▍自我介绍


给熟悉的人：适当寒暄

-Sorry to hear that. 				// 对方来信，且提出不幸；

-Congratulations on ...! 			// 对方来信，且提出幸事，要复述幸事；

-Hope this message finds you well. 		// 主动联系，且长期失联：


给陌生人/机构：自我介绍，一般告知身份即可，不必告知姓名

-As a student/graduate majoring in [MOJOR]/in our college // 常用，若介绍专业，次段要与之相关；

-As one of your consumers/customers 	// 仅用于投诉信

-As a local citizen/resident/dweller 	// 给校外人士/机构

-This letter comes from LiMing 			// 告知对方姓名


![图片](data:image/png;base64,)
	

#### ▍写信目的


-It is with great honor for me to cordially invite you to attend/act as/serve as a judge for the upcoming ... // 邀请信

-I am writing to offer you some conducive/constructive advice/suggestions/tips/proposals. // 建议信 

-It is with great reluctances for me to lodge a complaint about ... // 投诉信 

-I am writing to recommend/hand-pick [something] to you as the best choice. // 推荐信

-I am writing in the hope that I could be considered for the position of ... // 求职信 

-I am writing to express/convey/deliver/extend my sincere appreciation/gratitude/apology to you for sth./doing sth. // 感谢信、道歉信

-My apologies for the late reply. In response to your letter/questions/request, I am writing to // 题目中出现write sb a reply, write sb back, hear from sb, ask you to do sth.


### 第二部分

#### ▍建议信


[分类]

- 生活类: 2012(一)，2024（一）

- 社会类: 2009,给政府、媒体等机构提建议; // 难度低，不太可能考

- 杂糅类: 2012(一),欢迎+建议;


[写作思路]

- First-Second/Moreover-Third/Besides/Additionally/By the way/Furthermore;

- 以第一人称代入，将自己的解决方案当成建议给出;

 

[简要模板]

Relevant suggestions are as follows. To do something, [祈使句] first. Second, it is a sound policy for you to do something. Besides, you can also do something.

 

[建议句型]

- should, had better, ought to, be expected to, be supposed to // 建议用一个should

- It is essential for someone to do something.

- It would/might be a sound policy/good idea(明智之举) for someone to do something. // 最委婉

- It is advisable to do something.	// 最委婉

- Would you consider doing something. // 最委婉

- It would be of great benefit if someone were to do something. // 语气适中

- It would be a must for someone to do something. // 语气最重

- I strongly suggest that you do something.

- Doing something is a perfect way to help you do something.

 

[拓展方式：因果]

- Something is of cardinal/utmost importance, so + [建议句型].

- Something is a must +  [原因].

- Also, something might be useful. + [原因]/[建议句型].

- [建议句型] + [原因].

 

- Firstly, nutrition is of utmost importance for young people's growth. So, it is essential for the school canteens to diversify the meals and to increase the dishes rich in protein and fibres.

- Further, travel is a must in your summer vacation since it can help you relax and recharge.

- Firstly, you can start by remembering more words, because translation requires you to be proficient in all the common words and some of the advanced, more academic ones.

 

[扩展方法：添加从句]

- To do something (and do something), + [建议句型].

- [建议句型] +, which can help you do something.

- If you are intent on something/doing something, + [建议句型].

 

- To increase students' motivation to engage in sports activities, more games and competitions could be organized. 

 

[扩展方式：现状分析]

- [现状描述]. + [建议句型].

- [建议句型]. + [现状描述].

 

- Additionally, mobile payment methods like Alipay and WeChat Pay are very popular in China, and they are usually linked to a bank account. Once you settle down, I recommend opening one, as it will be more convenient for you to make payments.

- To increase students' motivation to engage in sports activities, more games and competitions could be organized.  Currently, there is only one annual school-wide sporting event, and many students believe it is insufficient. Therefore, both the variety of activities and their frequency could be expanded.

- Additionally, would you consider increasing the number of PE classes? Some departments only have one class per week, and many students believe that two classes are necessary to meet their needs.


[扩展方式：正反描述]

- [建议句型] + or it would be inconvenient/difficult/impossible for you to do something. 

 

- It is recommended that you wear a comfortable pair of trainers, as the path up Yuelu Mountain is not only slippery but also involves a mountain-climbing competition.

- Thirdly, do not forget to apply for a post-study work visa. Otherwise, you will not be allowed to work in China.

 

[扩展方式：并列]

- You can learn some basic Chinese, which will help you blend in and make friends quickly. "Ni Hao" means "Hello," "Xie Xie" means "Thank you," and "Zai Jian" means "Goodbye." Practice these phrases, and I'm sure you‘ll make local friends in no time.


【24一】

|Dear Li MingI've got a class assignment to make an oral report on an ancient Chinese scientist. I am not sure how to prepare for it. Could you give me some advice? Thanks for your help.Yours, Paul|
|:----|


Sorry to know that. In response to your anxiety and confusion, I am writing to offer you some useful advice on the report.

 

Relevant details go as follows. First, it is a sound policy for you to introduce some famous Chinese scientists like Cai Lun because there are massive existing materials for you to refer to. Second, to help your audience better understand your report, you had better design a PowerPoint to outline your key points. Third, rehearsing in front of a mirror would serve as a booster for your confidence.

 

Once again, I hope you can accept my suggestions! Looking forward to your reply at your earliest convenience. Hope you can make it!


#### ▍推荐信


【11一】

Directions: Write a letter to a friend of yours to 1)recommend one of your favorite **movies** and 2)give reasons for your recommendation.


I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to hand-pick *Ne Zha,* directed/written by Jiao Zi, to you as the best choice.

 

Relevant reasons for my recommendation are as follows. First, *Ne Zha*, a visually **startling** revolution in Chinese animation, is full of twists and turns, which makes the audience/readers zero in on the screen/pages. Second, it marks **the beginning of** the "post-wukong" era, **leaving behind simplistic** "good vs. evil". Third, it **shatters** the Western ster**eo**type of Chinese animation being "childish", **which explains why** it wins a large box-office success（票房高） and has flooded our screens.

 

Once again, I hope you can accept my recommendation. Hope you will enjoy it.


-the protagonist trumps the antagonist（反派） and conveys positive energy to us.


【17一】 // 景点


-It boasts a profound/far-reaching history and marvellous culture. When you wander in it, your comprehension of Chinese and culture will be further deepened.


【20二】 // 景点推荐+建议

Directions: Suppose you are planning a tour of a historical **site** for a group of international students. Write an email to 1）tell them about the site, and 2）give them some tips for the tour.


Dear Students, 


As your tour guide this time, I am writing to remind you of some details about the historical tour arranged for you.


Relevant details are as follows. First, to further deepen your comprehension of Chinese history, the Great Wall, one of the landmarks/must-visit places in Beijing, has been chosen as our destination. Second, it would be a must for you to **prepare** some **snacks** and beverages, since those are rather **money-consuming** there. Also, you, girls in particular, had better apply some sun-proof **cream** onto your skin in case it will be **scorching** on that day. // 推荐食物可用 must-taste food


Once again, I hope you can accept my arrangement. Please feel free to reach out to me if you have further questions. Have a nice trip.


#### ▍求职信、招募告示（样题，10，23）


求职信不仅要需要**罗列优势，包括专业技能如编程或语言、性格、工作经验**等，还要阐述对对方的**益处**，而后者是更重要的。


Dear [Hiring Manager],

-As a [graduate/student] majoring in [Education/Computer Science], I am writing to apply for the position of [POST], which I learned about on your official website recently.

-Relevant qualifications are as follows.   

-First, I am adept at data analysis and programming, validated by my certificate in Python (NCRE Level 2), which enables me to experiment, process data, and interpret results independently.

-Second, my enthusiasm, patience, and team spirit allow me to work seamlessly/collaborate smoothly with [colleagues/students] and foster a positive [learning/working/research] environment.

-Third, my internship at a top-tier technology company/school equipped me with hands-on experience in solving nagging and thorny technical problems, which is rather cost-saving and efficiency-promoting. 

-I would greatly appreciate it if you could consider my application and give me an opportunity for an interview. I am looking forward to your reply.

																				Best regards,

																			Li Ming

【大纲样题】


First, my fluency in English, supported by the CET-6 certificate, enables me to effectively communicate with students and contribute to teaching initiatives. 

Second, I am adept at **utilizing** office software to design engaging online lessons, which not only minimizes student distraction but also enhances learning efficiency. 


招募启事与活动告示都是通知，不同的是招募告示除了少量活动内容（时间地点主题）外，更加注重招聘，因此和求职信很像。招募告示需要包括的信息如下。


【标题】Notice, Call for Volunteer

【首段】

-[活动背景] 活动主题、时间、地点、主办方、意义，与邀请信相同；

-[通知事由] 学术活动（国际会议志愿者、科研项目助理），社会服务（公益活动志愿者、赛事志愿者），校园事务（迎新活动志愿者、社团成员招募）等；

【次段】

-[资格认定] 必备条件（专业能力、性格、预留时间安排），加分项（经验或特殊技）；

-[参与福利] 提供培训、发放活动整数、提供交通或食宿补助，提供学习机会、社会价值等；

【尾段】申请方式、截止日期、所需材料、联系方式；


【10一】

  Call for Volunteers																														May 5th, 2025

	An international conference on globalization is to be held at our university in early July. Fifteen volunteers will be recruited to serve as registration assistants and guides.

	Relevant qualifications for applicants are as follows. First, due to the necessity of communicating with foreign experts we invited, volunteers should be adept at/proficient in English, oral English in particular. Second, they are expected to be enthusiastic, patient, and always ready to help others, since there are many thorny（棘手的） and nagging（令人头疼的） problems to be dealt with. Third, the experienced/veterans will enjoy the priority. As a token of appreciation for your contribution, we will offer free meals and a recognized volunteer certificate.

	Please send your application form to our email address 1234567@edu.com by May 25th if you are interested. For further inquiries, feel free to contact us at 7654321.

																	Postgraduate Association

 

【23一】

Directions:  Write a notice to recruit a student \for Professor Smith’s research project on campus sports activities. Specify the duties and requirements of the job.


文献阅读能力、科学研究能力、人际交往能力，认真耐心的态度、经验；


Call for an Academic Assistant

December 20th, 2025


A research project about campus sports activities will be started under the supervision and guidance of Prof. Smith. Therefore, we would like to recruit a student as our assistant. The process will last approximately two weeks.


Relevant qualifications and requirements of the post are as follows. First, due to the necessity of hunting for and translating massive foreign references (English in particular), potential applicants are supposed to be adept/proficient/expert at formal English. Second, since paper writing and publication serve as a guarantee for the completion of our project, academic veterans, the academically experienced (those majoring in physique education), will enjoy priority during the interview.


Please send your application form to our email address 1234567@gmail.com.


Prof. Smith's Research Team


-to improve students' active involvement/promote active student participation in physical exercise

-enhance their bodily condition/improve overall physical well-being

-they are supposed to plan and organize weekly meetings, as well as to collect and analyze first-hand data from surveys.



活动与招募杂糅的类型，在中间段落可以先描述一下活动细节，然后针对细节提出工作内容和要求。


 【15二】

Directions: Suppose your university is going to host a summer camp for high school students. Write a notice to 1) briefly introduce the camp activities, and 2) call for volunteers. 


												Notice

																							May 5th, 2025 

A summer camp for high school students is to be held at our university in early July. We would like to introduce the activities. Also, fifteen volunteers will be needed to serve as logistics support staff.

Relevant details are as follows. First, we hope to take advantage of this opportunity to promote students' oral English ability. Therefore, the volunteers should be adept at English, particularly spoken English, as they need to communicate with our participants in English around the clock. Second, it will also be an online livestreaming, which enables parents to supervise their children's behavior and performance in real-time. Thus, the experienced in the Internet will enjoy the priority.

Please send your application form to our email address 123456@edu.com by June 5th if you are interested. For further inquiries, feel free to contact us at 123456.

		The Organiser of the Summer Camp


【25一】介绍，招募

|Dear Li Ming,I was really excited to hear that you'd invite some young craftsmen to demonstrate their innovative craft-making on campus. May I know more about what they'll show? Also, I'd like to help with your preparation work. Please let me know what I can do?Yours, Paul|
|:----|

Thanks for your attention and interest! In response to your enquiry, I am writing to to share the key details about the upcoming demonstration and how you could contribute.

 

Relevant details are as follows. First, since those craftsmen are all inheritors of intangible cultural heritage, they are about to display some goods themed and designed around local customs and elements (such as fans and porcelain). Second, an online questionnaire would be a valuable aid in helping us develop insight into students' views on the protection of ICH. If you are willing to join, you might be responsible for designing the links.

 

Once again, thank you a million for your interest and potential help. Looking forward to your presence!


#### ▍邀请信、活动类通知告示（13-14，19）


邀请信会出现标志性词汇⟦invite⟧，而对于通知告示，如果其中出现了活动名称，也可按照邀请信的思路写作，只是格式上还是通知的格式。


-On behalf of the Student Union, I am pleased to cordially invite you to attend/serve as a judge for the upcoming [ACT].


-Relevant details are as follows. 

-First, this contest will be held at [Place] at 9 o'clock in the morning on [DATE], and we hope to capitalize on this opportunity to [AIM]. By then, 300 students and teachers are expected to attend.

-Second, it will also be live-streamed online, enabling you to interact with netizens via the bullet screen comments.

-Third, to better publicize our activity, you might be asked to collect likes in your comments, with small souvenirs prepared as tokens of appreciation.


-Once again, I hope you can accept my invitation. I would be appreciative if you could spare time to join us.


[ACT]

-competition, contest, race, match, debate, game // 比赛

-meeting, conference, symposium, forum, seminar // 会议

-meeting minutes (流程 + 精神) // 会议纪要

-opening ceremony, graduation ceremony // 典礼 


[DATE] 

-毕业典礼 June, 开学典礼 September, 研究生考试 December // 月份的表示

-1st, 2nd, 3rd, 11th, 12th, 13th, 21st, 22nd, 23rd // 日期序数词的表示


[AIM] 

-比赛/夏令营 cultivate students' artistic creativity, campus engagement, interest in something

-会议 have discussions over sth.

-毕业典礼 see off the fresh graduates 

-开学典礼 welcomes the newly-enrolled


[Place]

-In the cloud-based conference room 123

-in/at stadium/auditorium/Student Center

|英文名称|常用介词搭配|适用场景|中文对应|
|:----|:----|:----|:----|
|Stadium|in the stadium/at the stadium|大型体育赛事、毕业典礼、演唱会|体育场|
|Athletic Field/Sports Field|on the athletic field/on the sports field|体育训练、比赛、普通活动|运动场|
|Track and Field|on the track/at the track and field|田径训练和比赛（有跑道）|田径场|
|Quad (Quadrangle)|on the quad/in the quad|校园草坪，举办音乐节、社团活动|校园广场/草坪|
|Recreation Field|on the recreation field|娱乐活动、社团活动、户外运动|娱乐场地|
|Gymnasium (Gym)|in the gym/at the gym|室内体育活动、篮球赛、校队训练|体育馆|
|Auditorium|in the auditorium|演讲、音乐会、戏剧表演|礼堂|
|Student Union/Student Center|at the student union/in the student center|社团活动、会议、学生聚会|学生活动中心|


在进行邀请信展开的过程中，更应该将自己的重心落在细节论证上，要避免司空见惯的活动形式，如"拍合照" "领导发言"，可以根据活动的具体类型，进行活动形式的单独设计与语料的储备。


比赛类活动【13】【19】

-Second, to ensure fairness and engagement, **audiences will also participate in voting** through **online polls**/**off-site ballots**. // 不记名式投票

-Moreover, a **revival match/repechage（复活赛）**will be arranged, during which the panel and audience may **nominate eliminated participants with the highest votes** to rejoin the competition. // 提名淘汰选手


文艺表演类活动【14】

-Before the official performance, our team has conducted several **table reads/script readings（**剧本围读**）**, **blocking rehearsals**（走位排练）, and **scene work sessions**（分段排练） to refine both the acting and staging. A final **dress rehearsal**（带妆排练） will be held shortly before the premiere to ensure a seamless presentation.

-In addition, there will be a **preview with audience feedback（**观众反馈场**）**, where guests are welcome to share constructive opinions to help us further improve the show.


【25二】


Hope the email finds you well! It is a great honor for me to invite you to play a role in a short play in the upcoming art festival.


Relevant details go as follows. First, the play has been adapted from the famous classic Chinese novel Journey to the West, aiming at the life of Ne Zha and marking the post-Wu Kong era. Second, the table reading and rehearsal will be held next Friday in the auditorium, and we hope to take advantage of this opportunity to preview with audience feedback. By the way, there will be about 6-9 characters in the play for you to choose from.


Once again, I hope you can accept my invitation. Please let me know your decisions as soon as possible.


【vita-w 打8+分的作文 2019二】

![图片](data:image/png;base64,)

【2022英一】

Directions:Write an email to a professor at a British university, inviting him to organize a team for the international innovation contest to be held at your university. 


![图片](data:image/png;base64,)

【2023英二】

Directions: An art exhibition and a robot show are to be held on Sunday, and your friend David asks you which one he should go to.Write him an email to 1) make a suggestion, and 2) give your reason(s).


【24二】


Hope this email finds you well. I am writing to share with you the potential plan for the survey mentioned the other day.


Relevant details are as follows. First, according to my arrangement, an online questionnaire would serve as an assistant for us to develop an insight into（深入调查） college students' views on the necessity of protecting old houses. So, I will be responsible for its design and issues. Second, considering that the photos of those houses will be uploaded onto some platforms for the sake of digital preservation, you will take on the duty of photo-taking on that day.


Once again, your opinions are crucial to this survey. Please let me know your decisions as soon as possible.


【23二】邀请

Directions: An art exhibition and a robot show are to be held on Sunday, and your friend David asks you which one he should go to. Write him an email to 1) make a suggestion, and2) give your reason(s).


Glad to hear from you! In response to your hesitation and confusion, I am writing to help you make the choice. (answer first: the robot show!) 


Relevant reasons go as follows. First, according to online information, there will be over 10,000 visitors who have already reserved the tickets for the art exhibition. Even better, I noticed it will also be an online livestream the other day. Considering the abovementioned factors, the robot show would be the best choice, which actually aligns with your interest. By the way, would you mind if I came with you?


Once again, I really hope to pay a visit to the show with you. Please let me know your decisions as soon as possible!


#### ▍投诉信


Dear Sir or Madam,

	As one of your consumers/customers, it is with great reluctance（不情愿） that I complain about [产品服务]. 

    The relevant reasons for my complaint are as follows. 【投诉原因】+【解决方案】 Please find the photos attached for your reference.

    Once again, I hope my problems can be well solved/resolved/handled/tackled/figured out. I look forward to your prompt and satisfactory response.

																				Best Wishes,

																					Li Ming


[产品服务]

-laptop I purchased last week, vegetable delivery I received yesterday, recent hotel booking service…

-手机：mobile phone, cell phone, smart phone, handset

-电脑：computer, laptop, netbook

-平板：tablet（勿写成ipad）


【投诉原因】要求考生从 "消费者" 视角出发，针对自身购买的产品/接受过的服务等，向商家/服务供应方索取一定赔偿。在自己的文章中应阐明清楚 "产品或服务本身究竟出现了哪些问题"，而不是仅仅提出 "质量有问题" 。

 

##### 【电子产品】（12）


[出厂问题]

- It cannot be turned on/switched on/powered up/booted up. // 无法开机，前文用了无法开机，后文就不能用运行卡顿

- Some tiny but discernible scratches exist on its body. // 存在划痕

- A certain chromatic/color deviation/discrepancy has been presented/detected. // 存在色差

 

[功能缺陷]

- The charging port is loose, causing poor contact/connection. // 充电口接触不良

- The system frequently freezes, even under normal use. // 运行卡顿

- It overheats easily, even with normal use. // 发热发烫

-The battery drains too quickly.

-The system randomly reboots without warning. // 无故重启

-Some of the buttons are malfunctioning. // 按键失灵

-The USB-C port is not compatible with certain accessories. // 难以兼容

 

[虚假宣传]

-I feel bait-and-switched （虚假宣传）—the discount vanished when I clicked "buy".

-You pulled a bait-and-switch by advertising cheap phones but charging extra for accessories （配件）. // 额外收费


##### 【网购蔬果】

 

[新鲜问题]

-The lettuce（生菜）was wilted（蔫了，枯萎） and soggy（湿软不脆）.

-The bread and vegetables tasted stale（蔬菜等干瘪，不新鲜）

-The celery（芹菜） was limp（不脆了） and had lost its crunch（嘎吱嘎吱声）.

-The oranges were dry and juiceless. // 水果干瘪、无汁水

-Some of the apples were rotten（腐烂发臭） inside.

-The berries were spoiled/decayed（变质腐坏，become/go ~） and covered in mold（霉菌）. // moldy 发霉

 

[运输问题]

-The peaches were badly bruised（擦伤，磕碰） during delivery.

-The bananas were squashed/crushed（挤坏） and turned mushy（糨糊）.

-The plastic wrap was punctured（刺破）, and the cucumbers had gone bad.

 

[口感不佳] // 由运输产生的损伤过渡而来

-the carrots were rock-hard（硬邦邦） and impossible to chew.

-The celery was too fibrous and stringy （老韧多劲）.

-The peaches were mushy and overripe（熟过头）.

-The salad greens（沙拉） were soggy and unappetizing.

-The spinach had a strange metallic taste（有金属味）.

-The watermelon was bland（寡淡无味） and watery.

 

[缺斤短两]

-I was charged for 2 kg of carrots, but I received **a short measure of carrots**.

 

##### 【外卖/堂食预制菜】


2020年英语二的图表作文曾考察过"快递"。

 

-Many pre-made foods（预制菜） rely heavlily on artificial preservatives（添加剂） including nitrites and flavor enchances（亚硝酸呀和增味剂）, potentially causing allergries and nrtrient losess（过敏和营养流失）. 

-Pre-made meals often contain excessive sodium（高钠） to prolong shelf life (保质期), which may lead to hypertension and cardiovascular diseases（高血压和心血管疾病）.

-Industrial standardization（标化工业流程） limits dietary diversity, often prioritizing profit over local flavors and resulting in the erosion of culinary skills and cultures（蚕食烹饪文化）.

-While seemingly affordable, frequent consumption of pre-made food may lead to higher healthcare expenses due to health risks.

 

[一些语料]

-点外卖：order/deliver takeouts, takeaways

-预制菜：pre-cooked meals/food/dishes

-添加各类辅料与添加剂：be tailored with various condiments and food additives

-营养不良：suffer from malnutrition/undernourishment

-高糖高盐高脂肪：be rich in sugar, salt, and saturated fat

-肥胖obesity，糖尿病diabetes, fluid diabetes（高糖饮料）, high blood pressure（高血压）

-体弱多病的人：the frail, the valetudinary, baletudinarians

-有氧运动：aerobic exercies


##### 【解决方案】


-According to your 7-day hassle-free return policy, I have the right to return the item within seven days of purchase. // 七天无理由退货

-Since the product is defective, you should bear the return shipping cost. // 承担退货运费

-I request a full refund of $100 for the returned product. // 赔偿

![图片](data:image/png;base64,)

【12】

Dear Sir or Madam,

	As one of your consumers, it is with great reluctance that I complain about the laptop I purchased last week.

    The relevant reasons for my complaint are as follows. First, a certain chromatic deviation has been presented. Second, the system frequently freezes, even under normal use. Third, you pulled a bait-and-switch by advertising cheap laptops but charging extra for accessories. According to your 7-day hassle-free return policy, I have the right to return the item within seven days of purchase. Since the product is defective, you should bear the return shipping cost. Please find the photos attached for your reference.

    Once again, I hope my problems can be well solved. I look forward to your prompt and satisfactory response.

																				Best Wishes,

																					Li Ming

 

#### ▍道歉信


![图片](data:image/png;base64,)

Dear Mr. Wong,

		**Sorry to hear about your complaint regarding the [product, e.g., the phone] you purchased. In response to your request, I am writing on behalf of our store to explain the situation and offer a solution.**

		**Due to the fact that** one of our staff members accidentally forgot to apply a protective film（保护膜） onto the screen, some minor but visible scratches exist, **which might bring about great inconvenience and disappointment to you.** **To make up/compensate for the issue, I am wondering if it is possible to** substitute the flawed one with a brand-new one. **You must be dismayed about our services, but I assure you that similar incidents will not occur. Hope you can understand our dilemma.**

		**Once again, I hope you can accept our apology. Please let me know your decision as soon as possible. Wishing you a pleasant day.**

																									Best Wishes,

																									Li Ming


【真题】


-Due to the fact that I was in a hurry when I went to the airport, I mistakenly took your CD as mine, which might bring about great inconvenience and disappointment to you. To make up for the issue, I am wondering if it is possible to mail it back to you as soon as possible/for me to pay for it, so that you can buy a brand-new one.


#### ▍感谢信（10）


Dear Bob,

Hope this message finds you well. I am writing to extend my sincere gratitude to you for sth./doing sth.

**Had it not been for your assistance, I would have been at a loss about what to do. First, your warm and generous help made it possible for me to** adapt to/adjust to/accustom to/attune to/accommodate life in the USA and get along well with the locals. **Second, you selflessly spared no effort to assist me so that I could better collect data and successfully finish my program. Third, it is my great pleasure to co-work with you /be guided under your supervision/be one of your family, and I will cherish our fellowship/affection. In order to replay what you have done, I would like to treat a meal/mail some specialties to you so as to consolidate and deepen our relationship.**

Once again, I hope you can accept my application. Looking forward to your reply at your earliest convenience.

Yours,

Li Ming


-give one's best shot to do, do something at full steam, bend over backwards to do // 尽力做某事


▍附件

• I've attached sth. for your review.

• Please refer to the attached document for more details.

• Attached please find sth. （非常正式）



### 第三部分


#### ▍重申目的


-Once again, I hope you can accept my thanks/apology/invitation/tips/application/recommendation. // 感谢、道歉、邀请、建议、求职、推荐

-Once again, I hope my problems can be well solved/resolved/handled/tackled/figured out. // 投诉信


#### ▍表达期望


-Please let me know your decisions as soon as possible. // 有求于人，期待值较高；

-Looking forward to your reply at your earliest convenience. // 适用于建议、推荐、感谢信，期待值一般；

-Please feel free to reach me if you have further questions.// 适用于回复信，期待值较低；

-Have a wonderful day!/Have a great weekend!/See you on Monday/next week! // 礼貌表达


#### ▍邮件落款


【署名前祝福语】

-Yours, Yours Sincerely, // 给熟悉的人

-Best Wishes, Best Regards, // 给关系一般的人
